items.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures fall after AI-fueled sell-off, with Google earnings on deck
items.description: Wall Street is seeing investors turn away from AI darlings toward safer investments after a rout in the sector led to losses across major gauges.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 3: Palantir Technologies Surges After Record Revenue Growth and Strong AI Demand
